title: BEM-841 execute route
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 16:30 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem840_route_after_bem839.json')
route=prev.get('status','unknown')
missing=prev.get('live_missing',[])
created_files=[]
if route=='repair_dispatch_results_next' or 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_codex_self_dispatch_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 proof repair: force dispatch result status file','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='dispatch_result_probe_created'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify workflow_dispatch_results'
elif route=='repair_claude_runtime_next' or 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 proof repair: Claude runtime state','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(q))
    status='claude_runtime_probe_created'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify Claude runtime state'
elif route=='repair_real_response_next' or 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem841_real_response_retry.md')
    mail.write_text('# BEM-841 | REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE RETRY'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: provide real response to architecture/protocol agreement request. Include Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED. Write to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/. This must not be a runtime blocker placeholder. No issue comments.'+sep)
    q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem841_claude_response_retry.json')
    q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v9','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-841 proof repair: real Claude response retry','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(mail),str(q)])
    status='real_response_retry_created'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
else:
    status='triad_present_or_unknown'
    next_action='verify triad and process protocol if present'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'route_status':route,'input_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_execute_bem840_route.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_execute_bem840_route.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Execute BEM-840 Route | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem841_execute_bem840_route.json','governance/reports/bem841_execute_bem840_route.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-840 route by creating the next proof repair artifact and dispatch queue item without waiting for operator')
"""
No issue comments.
